candidates.why: Explicit balance sheet cash line; exact match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Prior-period cash balance from cash flow statement, not the balance sheet cash line.

candidates.why: Explicit total current liabilities line; exact match for LCT.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Specific current lease liability component, not total current liabilities.

Non-current, not current liabilities.

candidates.why: Clear short-term interest-bearing debt item; appropriate component of STD.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of non-current liabilities - Balancing value
candidates.why: Appears to be current portion of non-current liabilities excluding finance leases, which fits baseline STD.
Debt maturity schedule line, but could overlap with other current debt components and is less clean than reported balance sheet debt rows.
Includes lease-related amounts given the separate lease current liability line and balancing value; less suitable for baseline STD.
Contains leases, which should be excluded from baseline STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current portion of non-current liabilities - Balancing value

variables.notes: STD is split across two non-lease current debt components: short-term bank debt plus current portion of non-current liabilities excluding leases. Avoided lease rows and avoided using the maturity schedule to prevent overlap/double counting.

candidates.why: Best match for current taxes payable/current tax liability on the balance sheet.
Tax receivable asset, opposite of taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not a balance sheet taxes payable liability.
